title: Five boroughs consolidate into Greater New York
note: 1897 map of the newly consolidated city — genuine period cartography.

title: Tenement House Act reforms housing
commonsFile: File:Airshaft of a dumbbell tenement, New York City, taken from the roof, ca. 1900 - NARA - 535468.jpg
note: Current image is a modern UK 'Dudley Drive' geograph photo; replaced with the ca. 1900 NARA dumbbell-tenement airshaft photo the law targeted.

title: Flatiron Building rises at 23rd Street
note: Current is a 2010 photo; Alfred Stieglitz's 1903 photogravure 'The Flat-Iron' is a genuine period artwork of the new tower.

title: Williamsburg Bridge opens over the East River
note: Current is a modern photo; 1903 image dates to the bridge's opening year.

title: Longacre Square is renamed Times Square
note: Current is a modern Times Square photo; period 1904 photo of the new Times Building that gave the square its name.

title: General Slocum fire kills more than 1,000
note: Current is an Empire State Building decoy; period image dated June 15, 1904 shows the burning steamer.

title: Stanford White murdered at Madison Square Garden
note: Period photo of the 1890 Madison Square Garden White designed — appropriate to the era.

title: Ellis Island immigration hits its peak
note: Current is an Empire State Building decoy; genuine 1907 Ellis Island immigrant photo matching the peak year.

title: First New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square
note: Current is a modern Times Square Ball logo; no verified 1907-08 period photograph of the first ball drop found on Commons.

title: Singer Building becomes world's tallest
note: Current is an Empire State Building decoy; period 1908 photo of the Singer Building itself.

title: Hudson-Fulton Celebration fills the harbor
note: Current is an Empire State Building decoy; genuine 1909 Hudson-Fulton Celebration image.

title: Metropolitan Life Tower tops the skyline
note: Current is a 2024 photo; Library of Congress period photo dated 1909, the year it topped out.

title: Uprising of the 20,000 shirtwaist strike
note: Genuine 1910 photo of women picketing during the garment strike.

title: New York Public Library's main branch opens
commonsFile: File:New York City public library reading room LCCN2007682035.jpg
note: Current is a 2021 photo; LOC period photo of the reading room dated 1911, the opening year.

title: Triangle Shirtwaist Factory fire kills 146
note: Genuine March 25, 1911 photograph of the fire.

title: Grand Central Terminal opens
note: Current is a modern night photo; period 1913 photo from the terminal's opening year.

title: Armory Show introduces modern art
note: Genuine 1913 Armory Show button — period artifact.

title: Woolworth Building crowns the skyline
commonsFile: File:The Woolworth Building in New York City LCCN2013650474.jpg
note: Current is a modern SVG logo; Library of Congress period photograph of the completed tower.

title: Equitable Building spurs zoning fight
note: Current shows the wrong (modern Seagram) building; no verified period photograph of the Equitable Building located on Commons.

title: New York adopts first US zoning resolution
note: Current is a 1939 World's Fair poster (wrong); an abstract zoning law has no clear verified period image.

title: Black Tom explosion rocks the harbor
note: Library of Congress 1916 photo of the pier after the munitions blast.

title: Sanger opens first US birth control clinic
note: Genuine period photograph of Margaret Sanger (1936); a real period image of the actual subject, within the era.

title: Silent Parade marches down Fifth Avenue
note: Genuine July 1917 photograph of the Silent Parade.

title: New York men vote for women's suffrage
note: Current is a 2024 SVG world map; period 1917 photo of a New York suffrage parade on Fifth Avenue.

title: Malbone Street wreck kills scores
note: Genuine 1918 photograph of the wreck.

title: Influenza pandemic strikes New York
commonsFile: File:Medical Department - Influenza Epidemic 1918 - Masks for protection against influenza. Letter carrier in New York City, New York, wearing mask - NARA - 45499319.jpg
note: Current is a 2020 COVID-era USNS Comfort photo; NARA 1918 photo of a masked New York City letter carrier.

title: Prohibition ushers in the speakeasy era
commonsFile: File:New York City Deputy Police Commissioner John A. Leach, right, watching agents pour liquor into sewer following a raid during the height of prohibition LCCN99405169.jpg
note: Current is a modern Harlem photo; iconic LOC 1921 photo of NYC agents pouring seized liquor into the sewer.

title: Wall Street bombing kills 38
note: Genuine 1920 photograph of the Wall Street bombing aftermath.

title: Harlem Renaissance blossoms
note: Archibald Motley's 1929 painting 'Blues' is genuine period Jazz-Age artwork (note: Motley was a Chicago artist).

title: Yankee Stadium opens in the Bronx
note: Current is a 2010 aerial; LOC photo of Yankee Stadium opening day, April 18, 1923.

title: Cotton Club opens in Harlem
note: Period publicity photo of Duke Ellington, the club's bandleader.

title: Immigration Act imposes national quotas
note: Library of Congress period photo of immigrants arriving at Ellis Island.

title: Lindbergh gets a ticker-tape hero's welcome
commonsFile: File:Duizenden mensen juichen Charles Lindbergh toe als hij na zijn solovlucht over de Atlantische, SFA022002367.jpg
note: Current is a 1969 Apollo 11 parade photo; verified period image described as crowds cheering Lindbergh in New York, 1927.

title: Holland Tunnel opens under the Hudson
note: Current is a modern photo; period image dated to the tunnel's 1927 opening.

title: Museum of Modern Art opens
note: Current is a modern building photo; no verified period (1929) MoMA image located on Commons.

title: Wall Street crash triggers the Depression
note: Genuine 1929 photo of the crowd outside the NYSE.

title: Chrysler Building briefly the world's tallest
commonsFile: File:Chrysler Building Midtown Manhattan New York City 1932.jpg
note: Current shows the Burj Khalifa (wrong); period photograph of the Chrysler Building dated 1932.

title: Empire State Building opens
commonsFile: File:Photograph of a Workman on the Framework of the Empire State Building - NARA - 518290.jpg
note: Current is a modern aerial; NARA period construction photo (1930-31) of a workman on the tower's framework.

title: George Washington Bridge spans the Hudson
note: Current is a modern photo; the one '1931' Commons candidate carries 2012 EXIF and other results are undated HAER photos — none verified as period.

title: Mayor Jimmy Walker resigns in scandal
note: Period photographic portrait of Mayor Jimmy Walker.

title: Fiorello La Guardia elected mayor
note: Period photo of La Guardia, circa 1934-1945.

title: Harlem riot exposes Depression grievances
note: Current is a Henry Knox portrait (wrong); no verified period photograph of the 1935 Harlem riot found on Commons.

title: Triborough Bridge opens
note: Current is a modern islands photo; no Commons image verified as depicting the Triborough Bridge in the period.

title: Lincoln Tunnel's first tube opens
note: Current is a modern interior photo; only undated HAER photos available, none verified as 1937 period.

title: New York adopts a reform city charter
note: Current is an Empire State Building decoy; the 1938 charter reform has no clear verified period image.

title: New York World's Fair opens in Queens
commonsFile: File:Trylon and Perisphere, New York World's Fair MET DP103125.jpg
note: Current shows the 1964 World's Fair (wrong era); Met period photo of the Trylon and Perisphere at the 1939 fair.

title: First regular US TV broadcast at the fair
commonsFile: File:World's Fair head asks president to fair. Washington, D.C., Jan. 17. Grover Whalen, Commissioner of the New York World's Fair today called upon President Roosevelt and announced that the LCCN2016874820.jpg
note: Current is an Empire State Building decoy; genuine 1939 LOC news photo of fair commissioner Grover Whalen with the president tied to the televised fair opening (period, though not TV-specific).

title: LaGuardia Airport opens
note: Current is a 2021 Long Island photo; no verified 1939-40 period image of the airport found on Commons.

title: Normandie burns and capsizes at its pier
note: Genuine period photograph of the SS Normandie (1930s), the actual vessel.

title: Harlem riot follows a soldier's shooting
note: Current shows the 1964 Harlem riot (wrong); no verified 1943 period photograph located on Commons.

title: B-25 bomber crashes into Empire State Building
note: Genuine 1945 photo of the Empire State Building on fire after the crash.
